'''Pernicar''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Hoth's Brand]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]]. Located in the [[Teraab sector/Legends|Teraab sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], it was a scorching rock.

It was named after the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Pernicar]].

{{Planet-stub}}
